synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-3126 Oracle Linux 8 389-ds:1.4 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-3126
description:
[1.4.3.39-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-148485 - Upgrading IDM to latest version: 389-ds-base and ipa-server breaks replication [rhel-8.10.z]

[1.4.3.39-21]
- Resolves: RHEL-141419 - (&(cn:dn:=groups)) no longer returns results [rhel-8.10.z]
- Resolves: RHEL-140272 - ipa-healthcheck is complaining about missing or
                          incorrectly configured system indexes. [rhel-8.10.z]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-3126

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-3126.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
389-ds-base-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.x86_64.rpm
389-ds-base-devel-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.x86_64.rpm
389-ds-base-legacy-tools-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.x86_64.rpm
389-ds-base-libs-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.x86_64.rpm
389-ds-base-snmp-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.x86_64.rpm
python3-lib389-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
389-ds-base-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.aarch64.rpm
389-ds-base-devel-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.aarch64.rpm
389-ds-base-legacy-tools-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.aarch64.rpm
389-ds-base-libs-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.aarch64.rpm
389-ds-base-snmp-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.aarch64.rpm
python3-lib389-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/389-ds-base-1.4.3.39-22.module+el8.10.0+90818+58a94ceb.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.4.3.39-22]
- Resolves: RHEL-148485 - Upgrading IDM to latest version: 389-ds-base and ipa-server breaks replication [rhel-8.10.z]

[1.4.3.39-21]
- Resolves: RHEL-141419 - (&(cn:dn:=groups)) no longer returns results [rhel-8.10.z]
- Resolves: RHEL-140272 - ipa-healthcheck is complaining about missing or
                          incorrectly configured system indexes. [rhel-8.10.z]
